svg.title: Godot Control MCP containers and five capability channels
svg.desc: The MCP client reaches a TypeScript server that owns five named channels. Editor mutation and introspection share a localhost WebSocket JSON-RPC editor plugin, while code intelligence, runtime debugging, and headless batch filesystem work use their dedicated Godot mechanisms.
